title: Paw Patrol: The Mighty Movie, Toy Jet Boat with Zuma Mighty Pups Action Figure, Lights and Sounds, Kids’ Toys for Boys and Girls 3+
features: MIGHTY PUPS ACTION FIGURE: Dressed in his PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie uniform, this one-of-a-kind Zuma toy figure is a must-have, featuring translucent parts that light up when he’s in his vehicle
PAW PATROL MOVIE VEHICLE: Designed with authentic details and styling, Zuma’s Mighty Movie rescue racer looks just like the exciting PAW Patrol toy boat that you know from the Mighty Movie
LIGHTS AND SOUND EFFECTS: Activate the synchronised lights and sounds in Zuma’s rescue jet boat by clipping him into the seat of his awesome toy boat, before racing off on a rescue mission
COLLECT THEM ALL: Expand your collection of PAW Patrol toys for girls and boys with toy trucks, action figures, diecast cars, dinosaur toys, stuffed animals, board games, jigsaw puzzles and more

EDUCATIONAL AND LEARNING TOYS: PAW Patrol preschool toys and toddler toys are great gifts for kids who like pretend play with toy cars, toy figures and playsets as an alternative to dolls or a train set
description: From the manufacturer In PAW Patrol: The Mighty movie is the brave puppies equipped with super powers and brave Mighty Pups. For Skye, the smallest in the superhero team, the new powers are a dream come true. But when mayor knowing better, the archrival of puppies breaks out of prison, things turn: He joins forces with a crazy scientist to steal the super powers of the Paw Patrol! While the fate of the adventure city is at stake, the Mighty Pups must stop the super villains before it's too late. And Skye must learn that even the smallest puppy can make the biggest difference.
